name: Drowning
summary: Water has blocked the airway. Can occur in surprisingly small amounts of fluid.
recognition: Found in or pulled from water

steps: Lay them on their back, open mouth/airway.
If you're on your own — do 1 minute of CPR before leaving to call for help.

warnings.text: Drowning CPR starts with 5 rescue breaths, NOT compressions — the airway is the primary problem.
